mapper.select:
SELECT HOMEPAGE_ID, FACILITY_IDX, FACILITY_NAME, FACILITY_DESC, USE_DATE, START_TIME, END_TIME, LIMIT_COUNT, APPLY_START_DATE, APPLY_END_DATE, APPLY_START_TIME, APPLY_END_TIME, USE_YN, DELETE_YN, ADD_DATE, ADD_ID, MOD_DATE, MOD_ID, BLACKBOARD_USE_YN FROM FACILITY_MANAGE WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND DELETE_YN = 'N'
AND ${search_type} LIKE '%'||#{search_text}||'%'
ORDER BY FACILITY_IDX DESC

SELECT HOMEPAGE_ID, FACILITY_IDX, FACILITY_NAME, FACILITY_DESC, USE_DATE, START_TIME, END_TIME, LIMIT_COUNT, APPLY_START_DATE, APPLY_END_DATE, APPLY_START_TIME, APPLY_END_TIME, USE_YN, DELETE_YN, ADD_DATE, ADD_ID, MOD_DATE, MOD_ID, BLACKBOARD_USE_YN, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FACILITY_REQ WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = a.HOMEPAGE_ID AND FACILITY_IDX = a.FACILITY_IDX AND DELETE_YN = 'N') AS APPLY_COUNT FROM FACILITY_MANAGE a WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND DELETE_YN = 'N' AND USE_DATE like #{plan_date}||'%'
AND facility_name LIKE '%'||#{facilityType}||'%'
ORDER BY USE_DATE, START_TIME
,FACILITY_NAME,START_TIME,END_TIME

SELECT HOMEPAGE_ID, FACILITY_IDX, FACILITY_NAME, FACILITY_DESC, USE_DATE, START_TIME, END_TIME, LIMIT_COUNT, APPLY_START_DATE, APPLY_END_DATE, APPLY_START_TIME, APPLY_END_TIME, USE_YN, DELETE_YN, ADD_DATE, ADD_ID, MOD_DATE, MOD_ID, BLACKBOARD_USE_YN, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FACILITY_REQ WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = a.HOMEPAGE_ID AND FACILITY_IDX = a.FACILITY_IDX AND DELETE_YN = 'N') AS APPLY_COUNT FROM FACILITY_MANAGE a WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND DELETE_YN = 'N'
AND USE_DATE like #{plan_date}||'%'
ORDER BY USE_DATE

SELECT HOMEPAGE_ID, FACILITY_IDX, FACILITY_NAME, FACILITY_DESC, USE_DATE, START_TIME, END_TIME, LIMIT_COUNT, APPLY_START_DATE, APPLY_END_DATE, APPLY_START_TIME, APPLY_END_TIME, USE_YN, DELETE_YN, ADD_DATE, ADD_ID, MOD_DATE, MOD_ID, BLACKBOARD_USE_YN, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FACILITY_REQ WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = a.HOMEPAGE_ID AND FACILITY_IDX = a.FACILITY_IDX AND DELETE_YN = 'N' AND APPLY_STATUS != '3') AS APPLY_COUNT, CASE WHEN SYSDATE BETWEEN TO_DATE(a.APPLY_START_DATE || ' ' || a.APPLY_START_TIME, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi') AND TO_DATE(a.APPLY_END_DATE || ' ' || a.APPLY_END_TIME, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi') THEN 'Y' WHEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') > USE_DATE THEN 'N' ELSE 'N' END AS APPLY_YN FROM FACILITY_MANAGE a WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND DELETE_YN = 'N' AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND USE_DATE like #{plan_date}||'%'
AND facility_name LIKE '%'||#{facilityType}||'%'
ORDER BY USE_DATE
,START_TIME, END_TIME

SELECT HOMEPAGE_ID, FACILITY_IDX, FACILITY_NAME, FACILITY_DESC, USE_DATE, START_TIME, END_TIME, LIMIT_COUNT, APPLY_START_DATE, APPLY_END_DATE, APPLY_START_TIME, APPLY_END_TIME, USE_YN, DELETE_YN, ADD_DATE, ADD_ID, MOD_DATE, MOD_ID, BLACKBOARD_USE_YN FROM FACILITY_MANAGE WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND FACILITY_IDX = #{facility_idx}
AND ${search_type} LIKE '%'||#{search_text}||'%'
mapper.insert:
INSERT ALL
INTO FACILITY_MANAGE (HOMEPAGE_ID, FACILITY_IDX, FACILITY_NAME, FACILITY_DESC, USE_DATE, START_TIME, END_TIME, LIMIT_COUNT, APPLY_START_DATE, APPLY_END_DATE, APPLY_START_TIME, APPLY_END_TIME, USE_YN, DELETE_YN, ADD_DATE, ADD_ID, BLACKBOARD_USE_YN ) VALUES (#{i.homepage_id}, (select NVL(MAX(FACILITY_IDX),0) + 1 from FACILITY_MANAGE where homepage_id = #{i.homepage_id}) + ${index}, #{i.facility_name}, #{i.facility_desc}, #{i.use_date}, #{i.start_time}, #{i.end_time}, #{i.limit_count}, #{i.apply_start_date}, #{i.apply_end_date}, #{i.apply_start_time}, #{i.apply_end_time}, #{i.use_yn}, 'N', SYSDATE, #{i.add_id}, #{i.blackboard_use_yn})
SELECT * FROM DUAL
mapper.delete: UPDATE FACILITY_MANAGE SET DELETE_YN = 'Y' WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND FACILITY_IDX = #{facility_idx}

UPDATE FACILITY_MANAGE SET DELETE_YN = 'Y' WHERE FACILITY_IDX IN ( SELECT FACILITY_IDX FROM FACILITY_MANAGE a WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND DELETE_YN = 'N' AND USE_DATE like #{plan_date}||'%' AND ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FACILITY_REQ WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = a.HOMEPAGE_ID AND FACILITY_IDX = a.FACILITY_IDX AND DELETE_YN = 'N' ) < 1 )
mapper.select: SELECT START_DATE, SUM(IMSI_V1) AS IMSI_V1 FROM ( SELECT TO_CHAR(START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS START_DATE, SUM(IMSI_V1) AS IMSI_V1 FROM ( SELECT (START_DATE + LEVEL -1) AS START_DATE, IMSI_V1 FROM ( SELECT TO_DATE(A.START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS START_DATE, TO_DATE(A.END_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS END_DATE, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FACILITY_REQ B WHERE A.HOMEPAGE_ID = B.HOMEPAGE_ID AND A.FACILITY_IDX = B.FACILITY_IDX AND B.DELETE_YN = 'N') AS IMSI_V1 FROM FACILITY A WHERE A.DELETE_YN = 'N' AND A.HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND TO_DATE(A.START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{start_date},'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(#{end_date}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') ) CONNECT BY START_DATE + LEVEL -1 <= END_DATE order by start_date desc ) GROUP BY START_DATE ) GROUP BY ROLLUP (START_DATE) ORDER BY START_DATE DESC

SELECT START_DATE, SUM(IMSI_V1) AS IMSI_V1 FROM ( SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD'),'YYYY') AS YEAR, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD'),'YYYY-MM') AS START_DATE, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.END_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD'),'YYYY-MM') AS END_DATE, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FACILITY_REQ B WHERE A.HOMEPAGE_ID = B.HOMEPAGE_ID AND A.FACILITY_IDX = B.FACILITY_IDX AND B.DELETE_YN = 'N') AS IMSI_V1 FROM FACILITY A WHERE A.DELETE_YN = 'N' AND A.HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} ) WHERE YEAR = #{start_year} GROUP BY ROLLUP (START_DATE) ORDER BY START_DATE DESC

SELECT START_DATE, SUM(IMSI_V1) AS IMSI_V1 FROM ( SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD'),'YYYY') AS START_DATE, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.END_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD'),'YYYY') AS END_DATE, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FACILITY_REQ B WHERE A.HOMEPAGE_ID = B.HOMEPAGE_ID AND A.FACILITY_IDX = B.FACILITY_IDX AND B.DELETE_YN = 'N') AS IMSI_V1 FROM FACILITY A WHERE A.DELETE_YN = 'N' AND A.HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} ) WHERE START_DATE BETWEEN #{start_year} and #{end_year} GROUP BY ROLLUP (START_DATE) ORDER BY START_DATE DESC

SELECT MIN( DECODE( TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'D'), 1, TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'FMDD'))) as SUN, MIN( DECODE( TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'D'), 2, TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'FMDD'))) as MON, MIN( DECODE( TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'D'), 3, TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'FMDD'))) as TUE, MIN( DECODE( TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'D'), 4, TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'FMDD'))) as WED, MIN( DECODE( TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'D'), 5, TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'FMDD'))) as THU, MIN( DECODE( TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'D'), 6, TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'FMDD'))) as FRI, MIN( DECODE( TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'D'), 7, TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'FMDD'))) as SAT, #{plan_date} AS PLAN_DATE FROM ( SELECT TO_DATE(#{plan_date}, 'yyyy-MM') + LEVEL - 1 AS DAYS, TRUNC(TO_DATE(#{plan_date}, 'yyyy-MM') + LEVEL - 1, 'D') - TRUNC(TO_DATE(#{plan_date}, 'yyyy-MM'), 'D') + 1 AS WEEK_NUM FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= LAST_DAY(TO_DATE(#{plan_date}, 'yyyy-MM')) - TO_DATE(#{plan_date}, 'yyyy-MM') + 1 ) GROUP BY WEEK_NUM ORDER BY WEEK_NUM
